name: gate_lib_555_50
description: MODEXP Osaka schedule + BLS12-381 gating at v50 (precompiles/lib.rs:555). At ArbOS v50+ MODEXP is registered with EIP-7823+7883 gas, and BLS12-381 precompiles become available. Below v50 BLS precompiles are removed. This fixture targets v50 with a simple block-producing deposit; the gate fires at precompile-table construction.
